name: managarten
description: Managarten — der Garten der mana-Apps. Enthält mana, cards, picture, chat, quotes und presi.

scripts.validate:all: pnpm run validate:turbo && pnpm run validate:pg-schema && pnpm run validate:theme-variables && pnpm run validate:theme-utilities && pnpm run validate:theme-parity && pnpm run validate:i18n-parity && pnpm run validate:i18n-hardcoded && pnpm run validate:i18n-keys && pnpm run validate:llm-strings && pnpm run validate:tier-patches && pnpm run check:crypto && pnpm run audit:encrypted-tools
scripts.audit:all: pnpm run audit:port-drift && pnpm run audit:i18n-coverage --summary && pnpm run audit:test-coverage --summary
scripts.dev:mana:all: pnpm docker:up && pnpm setup:db && pnpm dev:mana:full
scripts.dev:cardecky:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,credits,notify,server,web -c blue,magenta,green,gray,yellow,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:credits" "pnpm dev:notify" "pnpm dev:cards-server" "pnpm dev:cards:web"
scripts.dev:picture:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:chat:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:quotes:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,web -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:quotes:web"
scripts.dev:contacts:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:calendar:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:todo:full: ./scripts/setup-databases.sh auth && concurrently -n auth,sync,api,web -c blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:todo:web"
scripts.dev:todo:local: concurrently -n sync,api,web -c magenta,yellow,cyan "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:todo:web"
scripts.dev:memoro:full: concurrently -n auth,server,audio -c blue,yellow,green "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:memoro:server" "pnpm dev:memoro:audio-server"
scripts.dev:uload:local: concurrently -n sync,server,web -c magenta,yellow,cyan "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:uload:server" "pnpm dev:uload:web"
scripts.dev:uload:full: ./scripts/setup-databases.sh uload && ./scripts/setup-databases.sh auth && concurrently -n auth,sync,server,web -c blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:uload:server" "pnpm dev:uload:web"
scripts.dev:news:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:photos:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,web -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:photos:web"
scripts.dev:tags-test: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:times:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,web -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:times:web"
scripts.dev:manavoxel:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,web -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:manavoxel:web"
scripts.dev:calc:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,web -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:calc:web"
scripts.dev:guides:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:citycorners:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,web -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:citycorners:web"
scripts.deploy:landing:citycorners: pnpm --filter @citycorners/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/citycorners/apps/landing/dist --project-name=citycorners-landing
scripts.dev:plants:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:food:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.deploy:landing:food: pnpm --filter @food/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/food/apps/landing/dist --project-name=food-landing
scripts.dev:presi:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:storage:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:music:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:traces:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development up -d postgres redis minio minio-init searxng
scripts.docker:up:infra: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development up -d postgres redis minio minio-init searxng
scripts.docker:up:db: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development up -d postgres redis
scripts.deploy:landing:uload: pnpm --filter @uload/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/uload/apps/landing/dist --project-name=uload-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:todo: pnpm --filter @todo/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/todo/apps/landing/dist --project-name=todo-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:contacts: pnpm --filter @contacts/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/contacts/apps/landing/dist --project-name=contacts-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:calendar: pnpm --filter @calendar/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/calendar/apps/landing/dist --project-name=calendars-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:chat: pnpm --filter @chat/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/chat/apps/landing/dist --project-name=chat-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:picture: pnpm --filter @picture/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/picture/apps/landing/dist --project-name=picture-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:mana: pnpm --filter @mana/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/mana/apps/landing/dist --project-name=mana-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:cards: pnpm --filter @cards/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/cards/apps/landing/dist --project-name=cards-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:quotes: pnpm --filter @quotes/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/quotes/apps/landing/dist --project-name=quotes-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:presi: pnpm --filter @presi/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/presi/apps/landing/dist --project-name=presi-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:mail: pnpm --filter @mail/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/mail/apps/landing/dist --project-name=mail-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:moodlit: pnpm --filter @moodlit/landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/moodlit/apps/landing/dist --project-name=moodlit-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:it: pnpm --filter @mana/it-landing build && npx wrangler pages deploy services/it-landing/dist --project-name=it-landing
scripts.deploy:landing:all: pnpm deploy:landing:calendar && pnpm deploy:landing:chat && pnpm deploy:landing:picture && pnpm deploy:landing:mana && pnpm deploy:landing:cards && pnpm deploy:landing:quotes && pnpm deploy:landing:presi && pnpm deploy:landing:mail && pnpm deploy:landing:food && pnpm deploy:landing:contacts && pnpm deploy:landing:todo
scripts.deploy:docs: pnpm --filter @mana/docs build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/docs/dist --project-name=mana-docs
scripts.cf:projects:create: echo 'Creating Cloudflare Pages projects...' && npx wrangler pages project create chat-landing --production-branch=main && npx wrangler pages project create picture-landing --production-branch=main && npx wrangler pages project create mana-landing --production-branch=main && npx wrangler pages project create cards-landing --production-branch=main && npx wrangler pages project create quotes-landing --production-branch=main
scripts.dev:search: cd services/mana-search && PORT=3021 SEARXNG_URL=http://localhost:8080 REDIS_HOST=localhost REDIS_PORT=6379 REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD:-devpassword} go run ./cmd/server
scripts.dev:questions:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,api -c blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.dev:skilltree:full: concurrently -n auth,sync,web -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:skilltree:web"
scripts.dev:mana:servers: concurrently -n auth,sync,api,media,crawler,credits,search -c blue,magenta,yellow,green,cyan,red,gray "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:sync" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:media" "pnpm dev:crawler" "pnpm dev:credits" "pnpm dev:search"
